what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that registers an image asset for the design-source channel, pointing to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-01 and recording an id, attachment type, and added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target uses an image:// URI under design-source/capital-raise/p-01.
standouts: It is a provenance stub linking the design-source channel to a specific image asset.
The target URI names a capital-raise visual labeled p-01.
It records only metadata, not the image itself.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Attachment id follows an att- prefix.
Target asset uses an image:// URI scheme.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit timezone offset.
concerns: The target URI gives no file extension, dimensions, or format.
There is no alt text, caption, or description of the image content.
No author or provenance source is recorded beyond the timestamp.
The p-01 label is not explained within the file.
notes: A minimal ledger stub that records an image attachment reference for the design-source channel's capital-raise material.
questions: What visual content does image://design-source/capital-raise/p-01 actually depict?
Is p-01 a page, slide, screen, or artboard?
What image format and resolution is the target asset?
Who added this attachment and what triggered it?
How does this attachment relate to other capital-raise attachments?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file declares itself as an attachment metadata record and indeed contains only metadata pointing to an image asset.
apparent_themes: Separation of metadata from binary assets
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog image assets tied to the design-source channel, specifically capital-raise visuals, so they can be referenced, retrieved, and audited by stable id and timestamp.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer that associates the design-source channel with a specific image asset, supporting asset lookup and provenance without embedding the image data.
summary_for_embedding: This channel-memory attachment file (att-94542ef9) registers an image asset at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-01 for the design-source channel, recording only id, type, target, and added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to catalog and link an image reference to the design-source channel's capital-raise material.
